0.original: One. 2 00:00:00,880 --> 00:00:03,890 Expect future obstacles and difficulties. 3 00:00:04,160 --> 00:00:08,530 Every venture presents risks, problems, and uncertainties. 4 00:00:09,040 --> 00:00:13,570 Let's suppose you wanted to drive your car from Chicago to Los Angeles, 5 00:00:13,680 --> 00:00:19,330 but you insisted on waiting until you had absolute assurance that there would be no detours, 6 00:00:19,440 --> 00:00:24,690 no motor trouble, no bad weather, no drunken drivers, no risk of any kind. 7 00:00:24,800 --> 00:00:26,210 When would you start? 8 00:00:26,480 --> 00:00:27,089 Never. 9 00:00:27,440 --> 00:00:31,729 In planning your trip to Los Angeles, it makes sense to map your route, 10 00:00:31,760 --> 00:00:37,650 check your car, in other ways to eliminate as much risk as possible before you start. 11 00:00:37,920 --> 00:00:40,770 But you can't eliminate all risks. 12 00:00:40,770 --> 00:00:43,089 2. 13 00:00:43,600 --> 00:00:46,849 Meet problems and obstacles as they arise. 14 00:00:47,120 --> 00:00:53,729 The test of a successful person is not the ability to eliminate all problems before he takes action, 15 00:00:53,840 --> 00:00:59,089 but rather the ability to find solutions to difficulties when he encounters them. 16 00:00:59,440 --> 00:01:05,249 In business, marriage, or in any activity, cross bridges when you come to them. 17 00:01:07,440 --> 00:01:11,410 We can't buy an insurance policy against all problems. 18 00:01:11,760 --> 00:01:15,170 Make up your mind to do something about your ideas.
0.b1: One. You should expect challenges in the future. Every project has risks and problems. Imagine you want to drive from Chicago to Los Angeles. You wait until you are 100% sure there will be no traffic, no car trouble, no bad weather, and no danger. When would you leave? Never. It is smart to plan your route and check your car to reduce risks before you start. However, you cannot remove all risks. Two. Deal with problems when they happen. A successful person is not someone who avoids all problems, but someone who finds solutions when they appear. In business or life, solve problems as they come. We cannot buy insurance for every problem. Decide to take action on your ideas.
0.cn: 第一点。要预见到未来的障碍和困难。每一个项目都存在风险、问题和不确定性。假设你想开车从芝加哥去洛杉矶，但你坚持要等到百分之百确定路上不会有绕路、车辆故障、恶劣天气、醉酒司机或任何风险时才出发。你什么时候才能出发？永远不会。在计划去洛杉矶的行程时，规划路线并检查车辆以尽可能消除风险是合理的。但你无法消除所有风险。第二点。遇到问题和障碍时再去解决。成功者的标准不是在行动前消除所有问题的能力，而是在遇到困难时找到解决方案的能力。无论是在商业、婚姻还是任何活动中，遇到问题再解决问题。我们无法为所有问题购买保险。下定决心去实践你的想法吧。
0.ai_notes:
'obstacles': things that block your path or make it difficult to achieve a goal.
'venture': a new project or business activity that involves risk.
'absolute assurance': a state of being 100% certain or having no doubt.
'detours': a longer or alternative route taken to avoid a closed road or obstacle.
'map your route': to plan the path you will take to reach a destination.
'as they arise': to deal with something at the exact moment it happens.
'cross bridges when you come to them': an idiom meaning to deal with a problem only when it actually happens, rather than worrying about it in advance.
'make up your mind': to make a firm decision.
0.remarks:
'obstacles': 阻碍你前进或达成目标的障碍。
'venture': 涉及风险的新项目或商业活动。
'absolute assurance': 百分之百确定或毫无疑问的状态。
'detours': 为避开封闭道路或障碍而采取的更长或替代路线。
'map your route': 规划到达目的地的路径。
'as they arise': 在事情发生的当下立即处理。
'cross bridges when you come to them': 习语，意为问题真正发生时再去解决，而不是提前担忧。
'make up your mind': 下定决心。
